tools.name: cache.cacheNonceGet
tools.description: An endpoint for broswer retreive html documents that were cached durin the rendering process via a nonce (token)

tools.name: cache.cachePost
tools.description: An endpoint for Presalytics Renderers to cache html subdocuments for subsequent retrieval by the browser.  Documents Are retrieved via token expire after 1 minute.

tools.name: conversation.storyIdMessagesGet
tools.description: Get a list of messages that have been send in this story

tools.name: conversation.storyIdMessagesPost
tools.description: Add a message to the Story's conversation

tools.name: environment.getEnvironment
tools.description: pass rendering metadata to the client-side scripts

tools.name: events.storyIdEventsGet
tools.description: Get a list of Events available to users of this story

tools.name: events.storyIdEventsPost
tools.description: Add a message to the Story's conversation

tools.name: noTagsSpec.specNoTags
tools.description: json-formatted version of this spec with the tags removed to help with codegen processes

tools.name: permissions.storyIdCollaboratorsUseridPermissiontypeGet
tools.description: Check whether user have certain types of permissions.  Use http status codes to understand if permission is granted - 204 = Granted, 403 = Forbidden

tools.name: permissions.storyPermissionTypesGet
tools.description: Returns a list of possible user permission types

tools.name: restricted.collaboratorsPost
tools.description: Allows for bulk updates on collaborator metadata.  Restricted to internal admins

tools.name: schemas.storyOutlineSchema
tools.description: Json Schema for validating Story Outline objects

tools.description: Remove a session and dependant data.

tools.description: Get session metadata

tools.name: sessions.storyIdSessionPost
tools.description: Create a new session

tools.name: sessions.storyIdSessionsGet
tools.description: Get a list of sessions asscoaited with this story

tools.name: story.storyGet
tools.description: Returns a list of stories for this user identifie via the access token presentated to the api

tools.name: story.storyIdAnalytics
tools.description: returns an html document containing session and event metrics for the story

tools.name: story.storyIdDelete
tools.description: Remove a story and dependant data.

tools.name: story.storyIdFileOoxmlautomationidDelete
tools.description: Deletes a subdcoument of this story (e.g., .pptx, .docx, .xlsx)

tools.name: story.storyIdFileOoxmlautomationidGet
tools.description: Redtreives updated story as open office xml file (e.g., .pptx, .docx, .xlsx)

tools.name: story.storyIdFilePost
tools.description: Upload a file to an existing story

tools.name: story.storyIdGet
tools.description: Returns story metadata, inlcuding json object with story outline

tools.name: story.storyIdOutlineGet
tools.description: Returns Story's outline

tools.name: story.storyIdOutlinePost
tools.description: Update a story outline.

tools.name: story.storyIdPublic
tools.description: returns an html document containing a reveal.js epresentation of the story, if the story if set to is_public = True

tools.name: story.storyIdPut
tools.description: Update story metadata, including story outline

tools.name: story.storyIdReveal
tools.description: returns an html document containing a reveal.js epresentation of the story

tools.name: story.storyIdStatusGet
tools.description: Returns code indicating whether story has active running background and is healthy (e.g., the latest outline is valid)

tools.name: story.storyPost
tools.description: Upload new story to presalytics api

tools.name: story.storyPostFile
tools.description: Upload new story to presalytics api via an Open Office Xml file

tools.name: story.storyPostFileJson
tools.description: Upload new story to presalytics api via an Open Office Xml file

tools.name: storyCollaborators.storyIdCollaboratorsGet
tools.description: Gets a list users that can read or edit this story

tools.name: storyCollaborators.storyIdCollaboratorsInactivePost
tools.description: Edit story permissions for inactive users.  Requires admin rights.

tools.name: storyCollaborators.storyIdCollaboratorsPost
tools.description: Add a colloborator to this story

tools.name: storyCollaborators.storyIdCollaboratorsUseridDelete
tools.description: Remove a collaborator from this story

tools.name: storyCollaborators.storyIdCollaboratorsUseridGet
tools.description: Data to help you understand the access rights of a particular collaborator on this story

tools.name: storyCollaborators.storyIdCollaboratorsUseridPut
tools.description: Modify a user's access right to this story (e.g., grant edit permissions)

tools.name: views.sessionsIdViewsGet
tools.description: Get data for all views in a session

tools.description: Create a page view object for a viewing session

tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source
